sections.paragraph:
λειτουργέω [λειτουργός; commonly used in the Mediterranean world in sense of ‘render service to the state’ at one’s own expense in various capacities, including administration of cultic matters] ‘render (public) service’, serve

—a. in cultic and related matters Ac 13:2; Hb 10:11.

—b. in material matters Ro 15:27.
